Video.summary: During a high - profile serial murder case a old mentor of tony becomes involved with the case.
Video.title: Father Image, Part 2

Video.summary: While on the trail of an arsonist, the commish notices that all the clues point to the wife's father.
Video.title: Redemption, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter goes to Australia to help solve a murder involving a former girlfriend who's been missing for 3 years.
Video.title: Down And Under

Video.summary: The search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.
Video.title: True Confessions

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a Chinese gang leader being pursued by a police officer with a personal interest
Video.title: Night Of The Dragons

Video.summary: McCall goes undercover to help Hunter investigate the deaths of two models involved in pornographic films.
Video.title: Case X

Video.summary: During a high - profile serial murder case a old mentor of tony becomes involved with the case.
Video.title: Father Image, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony faces the biggest challenge of his career when an murder case from his past resurfaces.
Video.title: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1

Image.alt: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 1

Video.summary: While on the trail of an arsonist, the commish notices that all the clues point to the wife's father.
Video.title: Redemption, Part 1

Video.summary: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.
Video.title: The Cradle Will Rock

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist.
Video.title: The Contract

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer.
Video.title: Love, Hate And Sporty James

Video.summary: The malicious leader of paramilitary neo-Nazis take Hunter and McCall captive while planning their next attack
Video.title: Bad Company

Video.summary: Tony faces the biggest challenge of his career when an murder case from his past resurfaces.
Video.title: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2

Image.alt: In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2
In The Shadow Of The Gallows, Part 2

Video.summary: Reno is late and Cheyenne is seriously injured while trying to apprehend weapons dealer.
Video.title: Split Decision

Video.summary: Reno is offered a tempting but dangerous option when he finds himself being "recruited" by a dying hit man.
Video.title: Hitman

Video.summary: Reno relentlessly pursues a Costa Rican criminal with diplomatic protection, but Reno is heading into a trap set by his old nemesis.
Video.title: Sawed-Off Shotgun Wedding

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby take a vacation in Mexico but find themselves working again when a young honeymooner disappears mysteriously.
Video.title: Honeymoon In Mexico

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel north to a strangely prosperous town where the citizens are very protective of a known criminal.
Video.title: The Ballad Of D.B. Cooper

Video.summary: Reno suspects that Bobby's new girlfriend has a deadly secret.
Video.title: Most Wanted

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby trail a beautiful escaped convict, but the real criminal mastermind is someone they would never suspect.
Video.title: Liar's Poker

Video.summary: Reno investigates a series of mysterious racehorse deaths.
Video.title: Dead Heat

Video.summary: Reno protects a deceased hit man's daughter and reveals the truth to her about her father's profession.
Video.title: An Uncle In The Business
